ucs.title: [LLM] Famous Chollima 'Contagious Interview' — node.exe / npm postinstall spawning Python or curl downloader (BeaverTail → InvisibleFerret)
ucs.description: Hunts the signature DPRK 'Contagious Interview' chain where a developer is socially-engineered into running a malicious npm package as a fake coding assignment. The BeaverTail JS stager (executed by node.exe via npm install/postinstall) spawns curl/wget/PowerShell or Python to fetch and execute the InvisibleFerret Python backdoor — a process-tree shape almost no legitimate JS dev workflow produces.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_hash) as hashes from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name="node.exe" OR Processes.parent_process_name="npm.cmd" OR Processes.parent_process_name="npm.exe") AND (Processes.process_name IN ("curl.exe","wget.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*Invoke-WebRequest*","*DownloadString*","*atob(*","*Buffer.from*","*api.npoint.io*","*ip.json*")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process Processes.process_name Processes.process_hash Processes.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=left host [| tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.app IN ("node.exe","python.exe","curl.exe") AND All_Traffic.dest_category!="internal" by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | rename src as host] 
| where isnotnull(dest) OR match(process,"(?i)(postinstall|preinstall|run-script|install\.js|api\.npoint|ip\.json|atob)") 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` 
| table firstTime lastTime host user parent_process process process_hash dest dest_port
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _suspicious_children = dynamic(["curl.exe","wget.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe"]);
let _ci_strings = dynamic(["api.npoint.io","ip.json","atob(","Buffer.from(","DownloadString","Invoke-WebRequest","urllib.request","requests.get(","-c \"import "]);
let ProcChain = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.cmd","yarn.cmd","pnpm.cmd")
    | where FileName in~ (_suspicious_children)
         or ProcessCommandLine has_any (_ci_strings)
    | where InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","WindowsTerminal.exe","Code.exe","explorer.exe")
         or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ("postinstall","preinstall","run-script","install ","node ","npm install")
    | project ProcTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              GrandParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
              ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ChildImage = FolderPath,
              ChildName = FileName,
              ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              ChildSHA256 = SHA256;
ProcChain
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("node.exe","python.exe","pythonw.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
    | project NetTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl,
              NetProc = InitiatingProcessFileName
  ) on DeviceId
| where isnull(NetTime) or NetTime between (ProcTime - 2m .. ProcTime + 5m)
| project ProcTime, DeviceName, AccountName, GrandParent, ParentCmd,
          ChildName, ChildCmd, ChildSHA256, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, NetProc
| order by ProcTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _suspicious_children = dynamic(["curl.exe","wget.exe","python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe"]);
let _ci_strings = dynamic(["api.npoint.io","ip.json","atob(","Buffer.from(","DownloadString","Invoke-WebRequest","urllib.request","requests.get("]);
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName has_any ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.cmd","yarn.cmd","pnpm.cmd")
| extend TargetBin = tostring(split(TargetProcessName, "\\")[-1])
| where TargetBin in~ (_suspicious_children)
     or TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (_ci_strings)
| where ParentProcessCommandLine has_any ("postinstall","preinstall","run-script","npm install","node ")
     or TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (_ci_strings)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          ParentProcessName, ParentProcessCommandLine,
          TargetProcessName, TargetProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Famous Chollima Contagious Interview - node.exe spawns downloader
id: 6f4ad1b1-3c4f-4d8e-9c4a-9e8f5b1c0d77
status: experimental
description: Detects DPRK Famous Chollima 'Contagious Interview' BeaverTail stager pattern where node.exe (run via npm install/postinstall on a fake coding-test repo) spawns curl/wget/python/powershell to stage InvisibleFerret.
references:
  - https://www.crowdstrike.com/blog/famous-chollima-targeting-it-job-seekers/
  - https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/dprk-job-themed-cyber-attacks/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent_node:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\node.exe'
      - '\npm.cmd'
      - '\npm.exe'
      - '\npx.cmd'
      - '\yarn.cmd'
      - '\pnpm.cmd'
  child_downloader:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\wget.exe'
      - '\python.exe'
      - '\pythonw.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
  cmdline_indicator:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'api.npoint.io'
      - 'ip.json'
      - 'atob('
      - 'Buffer.from('
      - 'Invoke-WebRequest'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'urllib.request'
      - 'requests.get('
  condition: parent_node and (child_downloader or cmdline_indicator)
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate post-install scripts that fetch native binaries (e.g. node-gyp, Cypress, Playwright) - allowlist by package name
level: high
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.007
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1195.002
  - attack.t1105
  - dprk.famous_chollima
ucs.rationale: Famous Chollima (CrowdStrike) / UNC5267 (Mandiant) / DEV-0699-class is the only DPRK cluster running the Contagious Interview operation at scale. Their tradecraft uniquely chains npm-as-delivery (T1195.002) → JS-as-execution (BeaverTail, T1059.007) → curl/python staging (T1105) of the InvisibleFerret Python backdoor. The combination of node.exe-as-parent + downloader-as-child + npm/postinstall con

ucs.title: [LLM] Famous Chollima DPRK 'IT-Worker' insider — RMM (AnyDesk/RustDesk/Chrome Remote Desktop) install on engineer endpoint with corporate Entra si
ucs.description: Hunts the parallel Famous Chollima operation where DPRK operatives obtain remote engineering jobs under fake identities and use 'laptop farms' + commercial RMM/relay tools (AnyDesk, RustDesk, Chrome Remote Desktop) to operate the corporate-issued device from Pyongyang via a U.S.-based facilitator. Correlates first-time-seen RMM install on a dev workstation with the same user's Entra sign-in from a high-risk / anonymizing IP within the same week.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("AnyDesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","remotedesktop-host.exe","ChromeRemoteDesktopHost.exe","TeamViewer.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","LogMeIn.exe","Splashtop.exe","GoToAssist.exe") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_hash Processes.parent_process_name 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| eventstats min(firstTime) as global_first by host process_name 
| where firstTime = global_first AND firstTime > relative_time(now(),"-7d") 
| join type=inner user [| tstats summariesonly=t count values(Authentication.src) as src_ips values(Authentication.src_country) as countries from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.app="AzureActiveDirectory" AND Authentication.action="success" AND (Authentication.src_category="anonymous_proxy" OR Authentication.src_category="hosting_provider" OR Authentication.src_category="residential_proxy" OR Authentication.signature="riskySignIn") by Authentication.user Authentication.app | `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)`] 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` 
| table firstTime lastTime host user process_name process_hash src_ips countries
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let _rmm_bins = dynamic(["anydesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","remotedesktop-host.exe","chromeremotedesktophost.exe","teamviewer.exe","teamviewer_service.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe","screenconnect.clientservice.exe","logmein.exe","splashtop.exe","gotoassist.exe","sunlogin.exe","todesk.exe"]);
let RmmFirstSeen = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where FileName in~ (_rmm_bins)
    | summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), arg_min(Timestamp, *) by DeviceId, FileName
    | where FirstSeen > ago(7d)
    | join kind=leftanti (
        DeviceProcessEvents
        | where Timestamp between (ago(60d) .. ago(7d))
        | where FileName in~ (_rmm_bins)
        | summarize by DeviceId, FileName
      ) on DeviceId, FileName
    | project FirstSeen, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountUpn, RmmTool = FileName,
              InstallCmd = ProcessCommandLine, ParentName = InitiatingProcessFileName;
let RiskySignins = AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | where IsAnonymousProxy == true
         or RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("medium","high")
         or RiskLevelAggregated in ("medium","high")
         or Country in ("KP","CN","RU","LA")
    | summarize SignInCount = count(),
                Countries = make_set(Country, 50),
                IPs = make_set(IPAddress, 25),
                RiskLevels = make_set(RiskLevelDuringSignIn, 10)
                by AccountUpn;
RmmFirstSeen
| join kind=inner RiskySignins on AccountUpn
| project FirstSeen, DeviceName, AccountUpn, RmmTool, InstallCmd, ParentName,
          SignInCount, Countries, IPs, RiskLevels
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let _rmm_bins = dynamic(["anydesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","remotedesktop-host.exe","chromeremotedesktophost.exe","teamviewer.exe","teamviewer_service.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe","screenconnect.clientservice.exe","logmein.exe","splashtop.exe","gotoassist.exe","sunlogin.exe","todesk.exe"]);
let RmmFirstSeen = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where Bin in (_rmm_bins)
    | summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, Bin
    | where FirstSeen > ago(7d)
    | join kind=leftanti (
        SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated between (ago(60d) .. ago(7d))
        | where EventID == 4688
        | extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
        | where Bin in (_rmm_bins)
        | summarize by Computer, Bin
      ) on Computer, Bin
    | extend UserPrincipalName = tolower(strcat(SubjectUserName, "@", SubjectDomainName))
    | project FirstSeen, Computer, UserPrincipalName, RmmTool = Bin,
              InstallCmd = CommandLine, ParentName = ParentProcessName;
let RiskySignins = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion)
    | where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("medium","high")
         or RiskLevelAggregated in ("medium","high")
         or Country in ("KP","CN","RU","LA")
         or RiskEventTypes_V2 has_any ("anonymizedIPAddress","unfamiliarFeatures","maliciousIPAddress")
    | summarize SignInCount = count(),
                Countries = make_set(Country, 50),
                IPs = make_set(IPAddress, 25),
                RiskEvents = make_set(RiskEventTypes_V2, 25)
                by UserPrincipalName = tolower(UserPrincipalName);
RmmFirstSeen
| join kind=inner RiskySignins on UserPrincipalName
| project FirstSeen, Computer, UserPrincipalName, RmmTool, InstallCmd, ParentName,
          SignInCount, Countries, IPs, RiskEvents
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: FBI/DOJ/Mandiant/CrowdStrike public reporting on Famous Chollima specifically calls out the DPRK 'IT-worker' scheme: fraudulent hires use AnyDesk / Chrome Remote Desktop / RustDesk to remote into the corporate-issued laptop sitting at a U.S. 'laptop farm', while the operator routes Entra sign-ins through commercial residential VPNs to mask the Pyongyang origin. Neither signal alone is high-fidelit
